_comment: Model token pricing used to compute experiment costs at build time. Rates are USD per 1,000,000 tokens. 'assumed_output_fraction' models the input/output token mix when an experiment recorded only a total token count; at a 50/50 split the gemini-2.0-flash blended rate would rise from $0.16/M to $0.25/M (a sensitivity worth noting on any cost claim).

local-llama-server.source: local GGUF inference on RTX 4060 via llama-server; marginal cost is electricity only, treated as $0/token

gemma-4-E4B.source: local GGUF inference (gemma-4-E4B, Q4_K_M) on RTX 4060 via llama-server; no per-token API cost
